title: cynanchum sublanceolatum f. auriculatum
intro: Cynanchum sublanceolatum f. auriculatum, a variant of the Cynanchum sublanceolatum plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is also known as the Chinese swallowwort and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Cynanchum sublanceolatum f. auriculatum, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, flu, and bronchitis.
